title: Satisfying Minecraft
description: This modpack is client-side and makes Minecraft very satisfying.
body:
This client-side modpack elevates the Minecraft experience by integrating various
enhancements, including audio mods like ExtraSounds and Dynamic Surroundings
and more. Moreover, it incorporates performance mods to optimize the overall
gameplay experience.

![A Cold Sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l6DYvZIK/images/6d25eea5606101477f8be54969030fcbded0f568.png)
